body:
Implementation plan added to issue description.

- New files: `src/types/storyHistory.ts`, `src/lib/storyHistory.ts`, `src/hooks/useStoryHistory.ts`, `src/components/StoryHistory/*`
- Modified: `src/app/story/[id]/page.tsx`, `page.module.css`
- Key decisions: 50-snapshot limit, line-level diff (no external library), sidebar tab system (Notes | History), restore creates pre-restore snapshot for reversibility

Assign to: Code Monkey
Recovery ticket; previous issue stuck (checkout 409) and cancelled. Previous: BIN-91.
